channel.title: Nothing New Under The Sun 2016 | "The truth is out there, you just have to look!"

War In Iran Goes Hot Again As Trump Says Ceasefire Is ‘Over,’ Might Reintroduce Blockade, Says War Was NOT About Destroying Iran’s Nuclear Capabilities – “James 1:8 A double minded man is unstable in
item.description: THE BIG PICTURE Confessions of a Career Thought Criminal – “Steadily lowering my social credit score. I sometimes have people ask me, “So what are you doing to help?” Sure, I’m full of radical takes and contrarian views, but how does that change anything? I would counter with the fact I am doing something. Really all any average person can do at this point. I call out the corruption, and the tyranny, and I don’t pull any punches. I name names. More recently, I have stepped up my attacks on Zioni
item.content:encoded: THE BIG PICTURE Confessions of a Career Thought Criminal – “Steadily lowering my social credit score. I sometimes have people ask me, “So what are you doing to help?” Sure, I’m full of radical takes and contrarian views, but how does that change anything? I would counter with the fact I am doing something. Really all any average person can do at this point. I call out the corruption, and the tyranny, and I don’t pull any punches. I name names. More recently, I have stepped up my attacks on Zionism, and the ZOG that rules America 2.0. That’s not going to win you any popularity contests.” – Donald Jeffries – GOOD ONE FROM DONALD!!! Here Comes the KIDS Act: USA joins the “age verification” club – “Yesterday, the US House of Representatives quietly passed a bundle of “digital protections” collectively labelled the Kids Internet and Digital Safety Act (KIDS Act). You might not have heard, because the US news was focused on other things,” – Kit Knightly Beware of the isms In a world of deception and distraction, misplaced priorities could come back to bite us” – Leo Hohmann Symbolic Crimes Reflect Subverted Times – “Incidents at the DC Reflecting Pool, NYC Knicks Parade, Maskachusetts lake, Montreal, Yookay, WNBA, and LA represent the absolute state of the West” – Yuri Bezmenov “We Sacrificed The Middle Class” – “Canada’s Top Food Economist Sounds The Alarm. You’ve felt it at the checkout. That quiet moment of disbelief when the total appears on the screen. You didn’t buy anything extravagant. No steak. No fancy cheese. You bought the basics and somehow you’re staring down $300, $400, $500. A third of Canadians are now going into debt just to buy groceries. People are dipping into savings. Putting food on a credit card. And the government’s response?” – Karla Treadway This Independence Day Remember Waco Unchecked Power Breeds Tyranny” – The Tactical Hermit If I Were The Devil – “How I Would Steal a Province Without Firing a Single Shot” – Connie Shields NEWS Freedom 250 – America’s Birthday Is Falling Flat – “America’s 250th Birthday is less than joyous among the taxpayers paying for this. Too many non sequiturs tarnishing celebrations. Palestine doesn’t exist any longer. Lebanon has been taken. Our neighbors are no longer our friends. Epstein Files remain redacted and hidden. Israel controls Washington. Israel is now bombing Syria. Why are we out of weapons but Israel is not? Word has been released that Trump is sidelining his fake friendship with Putin and secretly gave Zelenskky a thumbs up. Hope is slip-sliding. And Trump et al have no qualms about making billions for themselves on the backs of Americans. Deal after Deal reflects some family member is critically involved yet the FBI is arresting people who dared to touch the Reflecting Pool water ” – Helena Glass Trump Demands Gas Station Retailers Lower the Price Immediately to $2.50 – “”Gasoline Retailers must get their Prices down, IMMEDIATELY! They’re too high considering that Oil is now at $68 a Barrel, and heading south. The Retailers must quickly react to this statement, and do what they know is right — DROP YOUR PRICE FOR OUR GREAT AMERICAN PEOPLE! There will be no gauging, which is totally illegal.” – Trump. However, there is no law anywhere against gauging. Imagine the howls if Biden wrote gauging instead of gouging and demanded the price of gasoline be $2.50. As I type, the AAA listed national average gasoline price is $3.86 per gallon. If station owners dropped the price to $2.50 they would lose a mere $1.36 per gallon. But that’s OK because Trump demands it.” – Mish – THE FUCKING IDIOT OBVIOUSLY DOES NOT UNDERSTAND HOW THE OIL AND GAS MARKETS WORK, NOR CAN HE SPELL!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! US-Iran Have Delegations In Qatar, But No Direct Talks; Hormuz Energy Transit Rebounds – Oil Down Near Prewar Levels – “The Witkoff-Kushner delegation is now confirmed to be in Doha, and yet in its latest official statement Iran’s foreign ministry has made clear the Iranian side has no plans to meet US officials “at any level in the next few days.”” – Tyler Durden MOU: The Meltdown of Understanding – “After the tit-for-tat missile barrages that took place with several exchanges over the weekend, the first repercussion came as no surprise: Iran completely cancelled talks in Switzerland. However, if you look at Iran’s eventual rebuttal, you can see it is a carefully worded statement, in which Iran said there are “no technical talks” scheduled anywhere; but it did not say there are no talks whatsoever” – David Haggith Lions Alert! THE MARKET BOUGHT “TALKS” WERE HAPPENING… BUT IS THIS JUST MORE LIES AND MARKET MANIPULATION? (Because THAT Is EXACTLY What This Looks Like…) – “Markets trade narratives, especially from a “world leader.” And a headline saying “Iran requested talks” can do exactly what the system wants it to do… calm oil, lift stocks, and create the illusion that diplomacy is finally working. But appearance and illusions are not evidence.” – Gregory Mannarino They’re Still Pushing The Ethnic Cleansing Of Gaza – “They keep trying different angles and rebranding it under different names, but the end goal has remained the same since October 2023: the removal of all Palestinians from the Gaza Strip.” – Caitlin Johnstone Republican Socialism: 2027 National Defense Authorization Act Contains Provision To Create Slush Fund For Treasury To Take More Stake In Companies – The WinePress Supreme Court: States Can Ban Trans Athletes From Girls’ Sports – Tyler Durden – AS IT SHOULD BE. SHOULD HAVE BEEN NO DOUBT ABOUT THIS ONE!!!!! ECONOMIC NEWS Should We Hold Off On Stacking For A While? – “At least till dealer margins go back to normal” – John Rubino – ALSO WATCH DAVID MORGAN’S VIDEO LINKED ON SUNDAY!!! Inflation & Nominal Economic Growth to the Rescue: The US Government’s Ugly Fiscal Mess – Wolf Richter Imagine Your Tax Dollars Bailing Out Bitcoin – “Sick and inconceivable idea right? Sadly, not as inconceivable as we think” – Quoth the Raven. GOLD REVALUATION SIGNALS INTENSIFY: Hidden Central Bank Buying, $20K Pricing Clues, and Policy Shifts Converge – The Silver Academy The Silver Turn CNBC Can’t See Coming – “Traders are staring at the next five days. The silver market is being shaped by the next five years. CNBC spends its time interviewing traders trying to guess where silver will close on Friday. That’s entertaining television, but it’s a terrible way to understand a market whose biggest drivers are structural rather than speculative” – Kerry Lutz The World’s Gold Is Quietly Leaving London and New York – James Hickman (Simon Black) SURVIVAL, PREPAREDNESS AND SELF-SUFFICIENCY Setting Up a No-Excuse Everyday Carry That Actually Gets Carried – “Tolerance for how much gear can be comfortably carried varies, not only from one individual to the next, but by activity. You might feel it necessary to carry more survival gear on a wilderness trek than to collect the mail. Personally, I like to be prepared, and I try to practice what I preach, so I probably carry more EDC gear than most folks,” – Cache Valley Prepper – GOOD ARTICLE!!!!! Cleaning the Chimney: A Complete DIY Guide for Homeowners – Self-Sufficient Projects Staff DIY Indiana Jones Real-Life Survival Belt – “Start With the Belt Itself Everything else depends on this, so don’t cut corners here. A good survival belt needs to be thick, full-grain leather – not bonded leather or not “genuine leather”. Real leather, cut from cowhide, the way belts were made before manufacturers figured out how to press scraps together and call it the same thing. A good leather belt is also wide enough – at least 1.5 inches – to support the weight of what you’ll hang off it without digging into your hips by hour three.” – Jack 12 Skill-Building, FUN Summer Vacation Activities for Preppers – Daisy Luther Keeping Small Engines Alive When Supply Chains Don’t – “The generators, saws, pumps, tillers, and tractors you already own are only useful if they still run when parts, fuel, and repair shops become scarce.” – denob VERSE FOR THE DAY Ecclesiastes 10:2 A wise man’s heart is at his right hand; but a fool’s heart at his left.
